creator: mike@FreeBSD.org
text:
Adding to Audit-Trail.

----- Forwarded message from Gabor Kincses <gabor@acm.org> -----

Delivered-To: mike@freebsd.org
Date: Tue, 24 Jul 2001 09:11:15 -0500
From: Gabor Kincses <gabor@acm.org>
X-Mailer: Mozilla 4.76 [en] (X11; U; Linux 2.2.12 i386)
X-Accept-Language: en
To: mike@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: kern/6035: The system "sort-of" hangs when playing bad audio CD with 
 xcdplayer

mike@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> 
> Synopsis: The system "sort-of" hangs when playing bad audio CD with xcdplayer
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: mike
> State-Changed-When: Sat Jul 21 22:31:37 PDT 2001
> State-Changed-Why:
> 
> Does this problem still occur in newer versions of FreeBSD,
> such as 4.3-RELEASE?
> 
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=6035

Not sure.  I don't remember which CD was breaking the driver :(  I know
that a number of things got better WRT burning CDs.  If I come across
the CD, I'll let you know.

-- 
Gabor Kincses
(gabor@acm.org)
Running FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE

----- End forwarded message -----
